name: openclaw-vscode-channel
description: VS Code extension that hosts a chat panel and local receiver for an OpenClaw communication channel.

commands.title: OpenClaw: Start VS Code Channel Receiver
OpenClaw: Stop VS Code Channel Receiver
OpenClaw: Copy VS Code Channel Config

openclawVscode.autoStartReceiver.description: Start the local receiver when VS Code finishes starting.

openclawVscode.receiverHost.description: Host for the local HTTP receiver used by the OpenClaw channel plugin.

openclawVscode.receiverPort.description: Port for the local HTTP receiver used by the OpenClaw channel plugin.

openclawVscode.receiverAuthToken.description: Optional bearer token required from OpenClaw when posting inbound channel messages to VS Code.

openclawVscode.gatewayMessageUrl.description: HTTP endpoint that receives user messages from the VS Code chat panel and forwards them into OpenClaw.

openclawVscode.gatewayAuthToken.description: Optional bearer token used when the extension sends a chat message to the OpenClaw HTTP endpoint.

openclawVscode.channelId.description: Channel identifier forwarded with outbound chat messages.

openclawVscode.accountId.description: Account identifier forwarded with outbound chat messages.

openclawVscode.senderId.description: Sender identifier attached to messages sent from the VS Code chat panel.

openclawVscode.conversationId.description: Conversation identifier attached to messages sent from the VS Code chat panel.

openclawVscode.maxMessages.description: Maximum number of messages stored in the local chat history.
